title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF ICOGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LOOC, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON, TO SAN ISIDRO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2137 / 55 OG No. 36, 7634 (September 7, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2486, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF ICOGAN IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF LOOC, PROVINCE OF ROMBLON, TO SAN ISIDRO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of the barrio of Icogan in the Municipality of Looc, Province of Romblon, is changed to San Isidro.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
